name: WirelessGate, Inc.
summary: WirelessGate, Inc. provides wireless broadband and business domain services. It offers mobile internet, public wireless LAN, and Wi-Fi rental services, as well as telephone remote and smart answering machine services. The company also provides cyber security, authentication platform, Wi-Fi infrastructure, IoT, and corporate SIM services. WirelessGate, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
